response:
Here are comprehensive unit tests for the `is_valid_email` function using pytest:

```python
import pytest
from your_module import is_valid_email  # Replace 'your_module' with actual module name


class TestIsValidEmail:
    """Test cases for is_valid_email function."""
    
    # Happy path tests
    def test_valid_simple_email(self):
        """Test basic valid email format."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@example.com") is True
    
    def test_valid_email_with_numbers(self):
        """Test valid email with numbers in username."""
        assert is_valid_email("user123@example.com") is True
    
    def test_valid_email_with_dots(self):
        """Test valid email with dots in username."""
        assert is_valid_email("first.last@example.com") is True
    
    def test_valid_email_with_special_chars(self):
        """Test valid email with allowed special characters."""
        assert is_valid_email("user+tag@example.com") is True
        assert is_valid_email("user_name@example.com") is True
        assert is_valid_email("user%test@example.com") is True
        assert is_valid_email("user-name@example.com") is True
    
    def test_valid_email_with_subdomain(self):
        """Test valid email with subdomain."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@mail.example.com") is True
        assert is_valid_email("user@sub.domain.example.com") is True
    
    def test_valid_email_with_hyphen_in_domain(self):
        """Test valid email with hyphen in domain."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@ex-ample.com") is True
    
    def test_valid_email_with_long_tld(self):
        """Test valid email with longer TLD."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@example.info") is True
        assert is_valid_email("user@example.museum") is True
    
    # Edge cases
    def test_minimum_valid_email(self):
        """Test minimum valid email format."""
        assert is_valid_email("a@b.co") is True
    
    def test_email_with_numbers_in_domain(self):
        """Test email with numbers in domain."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@example123.com") is True
        assert is_valid_email("user@123example.com") is True
    
    def test_email_with_multiple_dots_in_domain(self):
        """Test email with multiple dots in domain."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@a.b.c.example.com") is True
    
    def test_long_username(self):
        """Test email with very long username."""
        long_username = "a" * 50
        assert is_valid_email(f"{long_username}@example.com") is True
    
    def test_long_domain(self):
        """Test email with long domain name."""
        long_domain = "a" * 50
        assert is_valid_email(f"user@{long_domain}.com") is True
    
    # Error cases - Invalid formats
    def test_empty_string(self):
        """Test empty string."""
        assert is_valid_email("") is False
    
    def test_no_at_symbol(self):
        """Test email without @ symbol."""
        assert is_valid_email("userexample.com") is False
    
    def test_multiple_at_symbols(self):
        """Test email with multiple @ symbols."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@@example.com") is False
        assert is_valid_email("user@exam@ple.com") is False
    
    def test_no_domain(self):
        """Test email without domain part."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@") is False
    
    def test_no_username(self):
        """Test email without username part."""
        assert is_valid_email("@example.com") is False
